feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error custom widget on Story
entry.content:
Hi team. iam having this issue when loading an custom widget to my story, does anyone know how to fix it?

Best Regards,

 

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: Output of one table col should be passed as input to Second table as filter in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

User will input the Compliant ID, We will get all the information related to that particular Complaint in Table1.

Table1 has columns -- Complaint information, Product Family information etc.

I need to get all the Product family values that we get in Table1 and pass as an filter to Table2 along with the other filters.

Could someone please give me a clue on how to get dimension values from Table1 and pass into Table2 filter?

In BO, it was achieved using Sub-query, i have to achieve the same in SAC now, as we are transitioning reports from BO to SAC.

entry.title: SAC - Content Usage (Open Story) per month
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I'd like to know how often a story is accessed throughout the year in every month. But I cannot find any chart/table in system overview showing it. All I get is a cumulative figure for the selected time horizon in System - Usage section.

Is there somewhere such overview? Or any guidance how to create it?

Thanks and best regards
Axel

entry.title: how to disable/hide release highlights popup in sap sac to the end users
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I unable to find an option to hide release highlights popup (as attached) which appears to the users when login (after the SAC new updates)

Is there a way that we can disable this popup to all the users as its not necessary to end users.

Regards,

Vijai Muniraj

entry.title: Dashboard Linking and Filtering Through Table Hyperlinks in SAC.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working on a project where we need to link two dashboards within SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) that both use the same BW live model. We’re attempting to use table hyperlinks to connect the dashboards, but we’re running into issues with both the Link to Story and Link to External ID options, as neither seem to work as expected.

Both dashboards utilize prompts for filtering, and we need to ensure that the selected filter values (from one dashboard) are passed correctly to the other. Has anyone encountered a similar challenge or found a solution for linking and filtering dashboards through table hyperlinks?

I’d really appreciate any insights or suggestions! 

Thank you in advance for your time and help. @William_Yu

entry.title: SAC exception aggregation type is lost after import job execution
entry.content:
Hi all

we have an SAC import model which is updated daily from BW query. Among other data which are loaded, we have some accounts which have exception aggregation type and exception aggregation dimension maintained and it  behaves in stories as expected.

The issue is that since Monday 18th Nov. after the import job runs and loads data to the model the aggregation type gets lost and the model has validation errors. Does anyone else has the same issue?

thank you

entry.title: Change a dataset in a SAC story and to keep the story structure
entry.content:
hi,

is it possible to change a dataset in a story and to keep the existing story structure:

i didnt find a way to do this...

1.) a datset with the same structure?

2) a datset with a modified structure (just to add some columns) 

br Oliver

entry.title: How to create a model in SAC joining multiple tables
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud 

Hi,

 

I am new to SAC and I am trying to create a model in SAC with multiple tables joins (not a star schema) just like in a data foundation layer in IDT universe or in Power BI.

Can someone please provide the best approach for this?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: How to generate a SAC Modell from an exsiting SAC dataset?
entry.content:
Hi,

i use a dataset in a story.

now i would like to use a ,model for this datset in this story. 

How to generate a SAC Modell from this exsiting dataset and to use this new model in the existing story, without creating a full new story? 

br Oliver

entry.title: SAC script to obtain Story Folder
entry.content:
Hi experts, here is a technical goal. 

In the SAC optimised story I would like a text box to be made visible only when the stories save folder path meets a certain criteria. 

ie

If the current Story path contains "Pathx" then Text box = visible 

It is so that we can make a clear visible distinction when people open stories saved in the 'centrally approved' folder where stories are validated and those homebrew stories that are being run from users own folders. 

I have tried to look if there is some script where I can obtain the story path, but cant find it. 

 

Any ideas?

Thanks all

entry.title: Change data access language in a story
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I was wondering if there is a way or a workaround for a single user to access a report in different languages without having to go back and forth in the settings? Depending with whom we speak, we need to adapt the report language and having to switch the settings many times per day is not the best user experience. 

I've tried scripting, but couldn't find anything any options.

 

Let me know if someone has an idea how to handle this

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Making Script Objects as global
entry.content:
Hello all.
I have doubt, we use Script objects to create functions that can be reused in the stories. Is there a way to make those script objects like they can be used in all the reports like a global or inbuilt function. This reduces code redundancy and make its easy to write scripts. Your thoughts and ideas will be of great help.
Thank you.

entry.title: Error SAML API SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently testing API calls on SAP Analytics Cloud.

My goal is to successfully trigger a data import job using this API.

I have broken down the problem into two distinct functions. The first one is used to retrieve the token. This step works without any issues when I provide my CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET.

The error occurs in the second part, which involves starting the job. When I call the relevant API and pass my previously retrieved token as a parameter, it returns the SAML login page...

Has anyone encountered this problem before? Do you have a solution?

Thanks you 🙂 
Have a nice day 🙂

entry.title: Dynamically set default DATE value for input parameter in Datasphere or SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

  Is it possible to dynamically set default value of DATE variable for previous day(CURRENT_DATE - 1) using INPUT PARAMETER(Datasphere) or Variable(SAC) ?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Adding Variables to Predictive Analysis
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a predictive analysis base that contains the forecast for 3 schools, showing the enrolled students in each one. My question is whether we can effectively add a variable that influences the results of this forecast and have this change reflected in the graph.

 

Thanks in advance,

Ganjos

entry.title: Story Calculations between 2 tables in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have 2 tables as shown below. Based on User Input, It will look back to 3 years data and will display in the tables.

 

  2020202120222024
Country     
USA 100200300400

Here, i have to calculate the Rate in the below table, for which i have to use the total amount for the corresponding year from Table 1 as a denominator as shown below dynamically.

  2020 2021 2022 2024 
  Value RateValue RateValue RateValue Rate
CountryCode        
USAA50(50/100)*10020(20/200)*10040 60 
 B40(40/100) *10030 50 70 

Could someone please help me on how to achieve this?

entry.title: Hotfix for upload data feature allowing users to load data into Parent nodes
entry.content:
Hi,

The new upload data in Data Management (Modeler) is allowing users to upload numbers even for a parent node.

When users are allowed to load data into top level, it is leaving the system open to any data inputs. In our case, when a user uploads data at a parent node mistakenly, it messes up the numbers at those parents and higher nodes subsequently. This feature has to have some kind of enable/disable button or check mechanism to enable only leaf nodes be loaded into the system. We do not want to allow users to load data into parent nodes. 

Is there a way already in the system to restrict this. Can it be quickly hot fixed.

entry.title: How to change or edit the dynamic text on SAC scheduling publication
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I am looking for a solution to edit dynamic text in SAC scheduling publications. In the dynamic text, I can only choose the current date and month. Can I edit it to subtract one month, for example, if I send an email in November but the text display October?

Thank you,

Felix

entry.title: aFacetValueIds is Null error in SAC transport
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are facing issue with the transports post the update. Transporting the folder also throws the error and is across the system. The error with transport is "aFacetValueIds is Null" and could not import the object. 

Even though there is an error, the object gets transported. The subsequent object does not get transported due to error. 

We also tried with the file system but throws the same error.

Thanks & regards,

Pranav Vyas

entry.title: SAC ODE Story error
entry.content:
Hi All,

Our SAC Stories were working fine, but ever since SAC Q4 releases, We are getting below error when we open SAC story which was built on ODE version. 
Does anyone facing similar kind of error?, Please advise.
[Application Error]:Reduce of empty array with no initial value
Correlation ID: 42899926-2344-4967-b264-383279313435 

Thanks in Advance.
